productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Casual Red Muffler
description: Enjoy the winter in style this season with this Red muffler from united colors of benetton. Drape it over your t-shirts or knot it over your kurtas and enjoy that hot street food in the mist with much comfort. Made of 80% lambswool and 20% nylon Length: 180 cm Width: 18 cm Wash care Dry clean recommended Hand wash cold using a mild detergent Do not bleach, wring or tumble dry Dry flat in shade Cool iron
